\tzpentry{ID5707}{Quantum Coupling Constant Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5707 introduces Quantum Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \alpha = \frac{e^2}{4\pi\epsilon_0 \hbar c} \approx \frac{1}{137.036} \end{equation}
